commentaries.author: Bede
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Now these are your servants and your people, whom you have redeemed by your great power, and by your strong hand. Those who signed it were Nehemiah, Athersatha son of Hacaliah. /1350/ Another translation1 has 'Nehemiah who is Athersatha', for Nehemiah had two names, which is why it is also specifically added, son of Hacaliah. This same point is suggested more clearly above when it is said: And Nehemiah (he is Athersatha), Ezra the scribe, and the Levites who interpreted to all the people, said, 'This day is sacred to the Lord our God'.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
